query: SELECT name, title, department, research_field, tags FROM professors WHERE university_name = 'Stanford University' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT name, title, department, research_field, tags FROM professors WHERE university_name = 'Stanford University' LIMIT 5;

rows.name: Allyson Hobbs
rows.title: Associate Professor
rows.department: Department of African and African American Studies

rows.name: Joel Cabrita
rows.title: Professor of History
rows.department: Department of History, Center for African Studies
rows.tags: ["CIA operations", "apartheid South Africa", "U.S. intelligence networks", "evangelical Protestant worldviews", "African churches", "transnational roots of African Christianity", "Black women thinkers"]

rows.name: Shelley Fisher Fishkin
rows.title: Joseph S. Atha Professor of Humanities and Professor of English
rows.department: Department of English and American Studies Program
rows.tags: ["race and racism", "American history", "Mark Twain studies", "transnational American studies", "literary studies"]

rows.name: Angela Garcia
rows.title: Professor, Department Chair
rows.tags: ["environmental anthropology", "gender and sexuality", "materiality", "medical anthropology", "political anthropology and political economy", "race", "ethnicity", "and collective identity"]

stdout:
name	title	department	research_field	tags
Juan Alonso	Professor	Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics	Engineering	["aerodynamics", "computational fluid dynamics", "aircraft design", "aerospace systems"]

Joel Cabrita	Professor of History	Department of History, Center for African Studies	Other	["CIA operations", "apartheid South Africa", "U.S. intelligence networks", "evangelical Protestant worldviews", "African churches", "transnational roots of African Christianity", "Black women thinkers"]
Shelley Fisher Fishkin	Joseph S. Atha Professor of Humanities and Professor of English	Department of English and American Studies Program	Other	["race and racism", "American history", "Mark Twain studies", "transnational American studies", "literary studies"]
Angela Garcia	Professor, Department Chair	Department of Anthropology	Sociology & Anthropology	["environmental anthropology", "gender and sexuality", "materiality", "medical anthropology", "political anthropology and political economy", "race", "ethnicity", "and collective identity"]
